name: Barley and Corn Salad with Arugula and Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 ounces soft fresh goat cheese, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook barley in a medium saucepan of boiling salted water until tender, about 30 minutes. Drain and cool.
2. Transfer the cooked barley to a large bowl.
3. Cook green beans in a large pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 4 minutes. Drain.
4. Transfer the beans to a bowl of ice water to cool. Drain well and pat dry with paper towels.
5. Cut half of the cooled beans into 2-inch pieces and add them to the bowl with barley.
6. Mix in the corn kernels coarsely chopped arugula.
7. Whisk together olive oil, vinegar, shallots, thyme, and dijon mustard in a small bowl to blend.
8. Pour enough dressing over the barley mixture to coat, then season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Arrange the remaining arugula on the edge of a large platter.
10. Arrange the remaining whole beans in a spoke pattern atop the arugula.
11. Mound the salad in the center of the platter.
12. Sprinkle with crumbled goat cheese.
13. Drizzle any remaining dressing over the arugula and beans, then serve.
